requiredSettings.name: OutputDir
requiredSettings.description: RAG output directory for extracted documentation

recommendedWorkflow: 1. Clone the repository to local path
2. Build the project to generate XML documentation (if applicable)
3. Run extraction to generate RAG-ready markdown files
bestPractices: Check if component has been built before extraction
Use the component name exactly as it appears in API docs
Enable AI integration for natural language queries
Schedule regular syncs to keep documentation up to date
commonPitfalls: Forgetting to build the project before extraction
Not enabling AI integration for expert queries

promptTemplates.systemPrompt:
You are a senior {{framework}} expert. The user is asking a question about the component '{{componentName}}'.
Here is the official API parameter documentation for this component:
=== API START ===
{{apiContent}}
=== API END ===

Here are the official code samples for this component:
=== SAMPLES START ===
{{sampleContent}}
=== SAMPLES END ===

Based strictly on the API and examples provided above, please answer the user's question clearly and concisely.
If writing code, ensure you use the exact parameter names listed in the API table.
promptTemplates.componentQueryTemplate: What are the parameters available for the {{componentName}} component?
promptTemplates.expertQueryTemplate: Based on the API documentation and code samples provided, answer the user's question about {{componentName}}: {{question}}
